text:
Why did the cat buy the alligator?


You see, the cat was named Oscar. He had never been much of a swimmer. That is until one day it came in handy... really helpful!

Oscar lived by a body of quiet water that bordered an ancient swamp. Every morning and evening, he would glide into the water to greet the sun or doldrums, occasionally letting out a contented purr.

One peculiar evening, Oscar found himself curious about something he couldn't exactly identify - a strange, glowing shadow that seemed intent on crossing his little domain. Of course, being cautious but curious, Oscar decided to investigate.

As he got closer, he noticed the shadow didn't seem alarmed by his presence. It moved calmly towards a large tree at the water's edge. Oh no! Oscar thought. That's poisonous... Why?

Deciding his curiosity outweighed his caution, Oscar carefully stepped closer. That's when it happened. The shadow spoke.

"Well, hello there,"
